The '''''Wicked Pleasure''''' was [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]]'s [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|KDY]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]]. It had a roof-mounted [[Turret/Legends|turret]] and was based at [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport's]] [[Docking Bay 3732]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
